description: Leakage-safe released-Robometer supervision over the 33 truncated successful OpenARM2 shirt-fold episodes and blinded v2 stage-quality rubric.

official_robometer.architecture: released Robometer progress and preference heads with LoRA fine-tuning

tasks.full_episode: Fold the T-shirt in three steps: fold one side, fold the other side, then fold the bottom to the top.

stages.side_one: Fold one side of the T-shirt neatly.
stages.side_two: Fold the other side of the T-shirt neatly.
stages.bottom_to_top: Fold the bottom of the T-shirt to the top neatly.

supervision.full_episode: successful trajectory with partial_success=1.0 for temporal progress
supervision.stage_clip: successful stage execution with partial_success=quality_score/5; only the final frame is used for partial-progress loss
supervision.preference: released Robometer same-task pairing orders stage clips by partial_success when the difference is at least 0.2
supervision.quality_labels: all trajectories remain successful; no successful demonstration is relabeled as a failure
supervision.smoothing: quality-neutral and preserved inside exact stage clips
supervision.repeated_grasps: evaluation-only; not treated as failures or sampling penalties
